title: stenochlaena pollicina
intro: Stenochlaena pollicina, also known as the Australian Staghorn Fern or Australian Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to Australia. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stenochlaena pollicina include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Stenochlaena pollicina can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
